introduction.advice: Welcome! Use the Actions panel on the right to shop, cook, organize your fridge, and plan meals. Check your Stats and Inventory each day to stay on top of things. Let's reduce food waste together!

shopping-entry.advice: Before you add items to your cart, check your Inventory — you may already have things at home. Stick to your list to avoid overbuying and save money.

cooking-entry.advice: Check your Inventory for items marked 'Expiring Soon' — cook those first to prevent waste. Match your portion size to your household so you don't make too much.

fridge-entry.advice: Keep expiring items at the front so they're easy to see and use first. Proper storage helps food last longer and cuts down on waste.

planning-entry.advice: Planning your meals for the week helps you write a focused shopping list. Think about how many people you're feeding and how many days you want to plan for.

day1-ideal-flow.advice: Welcome to your dashboard! On your first day, follow this order — it mirrors how real households cut waste: (1) Plan Meals so you know what to buy, (2) Go Shopping with that plan in mind, (3) Organize Fridge so new groceries go in smart spots, (4) Cook Meal using what you have. Check Stats and Inventory anytime. I'll nudge you if a step is still locked!

day1-need-plan.advice: Start with Plan Meals first. When you save a plan, you'll unlock Go Shopping — that way you buy for real meals, not random extras.

day1-need-shop.advice: Head to Go Shopping before organizing the fridge. You want your groceries home before you decide where they live in the fridge.

day1-need-fridge.advice: Organize Fridge before cooking today. Putting food away neatly helps you see what you have and use it before it spoils.

shopping-complete-good.advice: Nice shopping trip! You stayed on budget and got what you needed. Head back to the dashboard and cook any items that are close to expiring.

shopping-complete-overspent.advice: You went over budget this trip. Next time, check your list before adding extras. Try the Plan Meals action before shopping to keep spending focused.

shopping-complete-underbudget.advice: Great restraint — you came in under budget! Make sure you have enough ingredients to feed your household for the next few days.

cooking-complete-good.advice: Meal cooked! Check your Inventory for any leftovers you stored. If anything is still expiring soon, plan to cook again tomorrow.

cooking-complete-smart.advice: Well done — you used items that were about to expire! That's one of the best ways to cut food waste. Keep an eye on expiring items each day.

cooking-complete-toolarge.advice: You made more food than your household needs right now. Store leftovers in the fridge or freezer right away so nothing goes to waste.

day-summary-excellent.advice: Incredible day — under 1 lb of waste! Check your Inventory for any items expiring in the next day or two and plan a meal around them.

day-summary-good.advice: Good day — under 2 lbs of waste. To keep improving, try organizing your fridge so expiring items are front and center.

day-summary-okay.advice: About 3 lbs wasted today. Try using the Plan Meals action before your next shopping trip to buy only what you will actually use.

day-summary-poor.advice: Over 4 lbs wasted today. Check your Inventory for spoiled items and clear them out. Then use Plan Meals to build a smarter list for your next shop.

achievement-earned.advice: You earned a new achievement! Keep up the good habits — check your Stats panel to see your progress and look for more ways to cut waste.

fridge-complete.advice: Great fridge session! Items are better organized now. Head to Cook Meal if anything is still expiring soon, or End Day to move forward.

planning-complete.advice: Meal plan saved! When you're ready to shop, the list will reflect your planned recipes. Head to Go Shopping next to put the plan into action.
